source: plan/bearings.md § Group-buy hero art — colorful SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: 80% TKL-style keyboard outline with a diagonal paper-airplane mid-case fold; ochre fills the folded triangle
prompt: Wuque Studio Paper80 x Whatever Studio is an 80% (TKL) aluminum board with a lock-hole gasket mount and a paper-airplane-inspired diagonal fold across the mid-case. The piece reads the brief literally: the focal load-bearing element is the fold itself, treated as a single ochre crease line running corner-to-corner across the case (top-left interior corner to bottom-right interior corner) with the lower-triangular half of the case filled with ochre at 0.42 alpha — the 'folded paper plane' wing. Case sits at x=90..1110, y=304..633 (~85% canvas width × ~44% height), with an inset bezel rect at x=106..1094, y=320..617 used both as the visual second line and as the clipPath that contains the ochre triangle so the splash never bleeds past the rounded case profile. The 80% silhouette is unambiguous: 6 rows (F-row recessed at smaller radius and lower opacity, plus 5 alpha rows at full weight) span 15 columns of dot-grid keys, NO numpad (the defining 80% tell vs. fullsize), a 3×2 nav cluster of rounded rects on the right-top (Ins/Home/PgUp and Del/End/PgDn — the TKL nav block), and a four-key arrow cluster bottom-right (up above; left/down/right beneath). Mod row 5 thins out to mimic Ctrl/Win/Alt/Space/Alt/Fn/Ctrl. Faint vertical column guides at 0.14 opacity double as both column separators and a subtle paper-grid texture, leaning into the 'paper' theme without adding a second color. The crease is drawn at 2.5px in the ochre splash hue at full chroma — slightly thicker than the 2px warm-grey body stroke so it reads as the focal element at thumbnail size. Four tiny ochre dots at the case interior corners signal the Paper80's lock-hole gasket-mount points without introducing a second hue. Single-splash discipline preserved throughout: ochre is reserved for the fold triangle, the crease, the corner gasket dots, and the faint background wash; everything else (case stroke, bezel inset, dot grid, nav cluster, arrow cluster, column guides) renders in the warm-grey 2px stroke. Voice tracks the 'knowledgeable peer' editorial register — readable at thumbnail, no breathless extras.
